deals.Description: An AI startup building open-source AI systems and infrastructure for training, fine-tuning, and deploying AI models, including a new data center in France.
deals.Investors: Bpifrance, BNP Paribas, Crédit Agricole CIB, HSBC, La Banque Postale, MUFG, Natixis CIB
deals.Founders: Arthur Mensch, Guillaume Lample, Timothée Lacroix

deals.Description: An open-source orchestration platform unifying data, AI, infrastructure, and business workflows, aiming to expand in North America and Europe.
An AI-powered app that identifies objects and surroundings in real-time to enhance city accessibility for visually impaired individuals.
Specializes in intelligent Building Management Systems (BMS) to reduce energy consumption in tertiary buildings, with plans to integrate more AI.
deals.Investors: Île-de-France Décarbonation fund (managed by Eiffel Investment Group)
deals.Founders: Jean-Romain Bardet, Cédric Godefroy, Bastien Robinot

deals.Description: AI agentic platform enabling users to create and manage activities without technical skills, focusing on action and autonomy for SMEs and entrepreneurs.
Developing an agricultural analytics system using satellite technologies and AI for yield forecasting and crop monitoring.
A platform utilizing multi-agent AI to optimize the creation and management of commercial documents, aiming to automate paperwork for sales teams.
deals.Investors: Eurazeo, SuperCapital-Side Angels, Apok Invest, Station F

deals.Description: An assurtech startup developing AI- and big-data-powered solutions for risk prevention and claims management in the insurance sector.
Paris-based decision intelligence platform built for boards and senior executives. It ingests over 100,000 sources and synthesises them into two-minute executive briefings.
deals.Investors: Seedcamp, Plug and Play, MS&AD, Raise, Bpifrance, Drysdale Ventures, Anamcara Capital, xdeck Ventures

deals.Description: Franco-American startup developing an AI-powered geospatial platform for renewable energy projects. The platform centralises over 150 continuously updated geographical and regulatory datasets.
deals.Investors: AENU, Y Combinator, Kima Ventures, RAISE Sherpas, Better Angle, Collaborative Fund

deals.Description: French aviation technology company specializing in autonomous drone-based aircraft inspection systems and AI-driven maintenance platforms for commercial aviation.
Deeptech startup developing Blood'Up, a medical device for precise artery localization, with a future version integrating artificial intelligence for medical applications.
Startup developing a router with a Radio Processing Unit chip for 3-10x improved Wifi performance, inspired by 5G and satellite communication, with success depending on a crowdfunding campaign.
deals.Founders: Team of former Nokia and Bell Labs engineers

deals.Description: French startup specializing in quantum computing, aiming to industrialize quantum informatics.
